name: @lazyz/codegraph
description: Codex plugin MCP wrapper for CodeGraph.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && bun build src/serve.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/serve.js && bun build src/cli.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/cli.js
